title: Trading Strategy
noParameters: This strategy has no configurable parameters.

descriptions.snowball: Dual-basket hedging strategy: rotational profit-taking on the trend side and averaging-down with step-based partial closes on the counter side.
descriptions.adaptive_net: US-compatible net-position strategy that combines pluggable metrics into a target net exposure.

validation.formErrors: Please fix the errors below before proceeding.
validation.linkedCountZero: Set the related field first to configure per-step values.

adaptiveNet.noState: Adaptive Net state will appear after the strategy processes market data.

prediction.title: Prediction
prediction.description: Weighted metric output converted into target net exposure.
prediction.directionalEdgeHelp: Directional edge is the normalized long-vs-short advantage: -1 is strong short, 0 is neutral, and +1 is strong long.

metrics.title: Metrics
metrics.description: Normalized strategy metrics used by the decision engine. Direction score is [-1, +1], confidence is [0, 1], and size multiplier is [0, 1].

charts.noHistory: Time-series data will appear after at least two rebalance decisions.

metricReasons.regime: Regime favors directional exposure when trend strength is persistent.
metricReasons.trend_momentum: Recent directional move normalized by realized noise.
metricReasons.mean_reversion: Distance from rolling mean converted to contrarian pressure.
metricReasons.inventory_exposure: Existing net exposure penalizes adding in the same direction.
metricReasons.timesfm_forecast: Neutral placeholder until a TimesFM forecast provider is connected.

decision.title: Rebalance Decision
decision.description: Compares the prediction with current net exposure and resolves the final direction and order size.
